title: FrugalReview
description: An over-engineering review run (agency/capabilities/frugal; Spec 348). Records the scope reviewed and the count of in-scope files + decidable bloat findings (composed from analyze.quality). The judgment tags (stdlib/native/shrink) are the reviewer's; this node records the deterministic pass as provenance.

scope.description: The review scope: 'diff' (working-tree changes) or 'repo' (tracked source).

files.description: Count of in-scope Python files reviewed.

decidable.description: Count of decidable bloat findings surfaced by the deterministic pass.
